description: XML heat-equation input normalized into cell and Laplacian block stations.

parameters.equation: <heat1d cells="21" length="1" alpha="0.02" t0="0" t1="0.2" dt="0.0025" leftBoundary="0" rightBoundary="0"><equation>du/dt = alpha*d2u/dx2</equation><initial>sin(pi*x/length)</initial></heat1d>
